heading: Dividends paid by regulated investment company after close of taxable year
label: 855 Dividends paid by regulated investment company after close of taxable year
notes: References in TextThe Investment Company Act of 1940, referred to in subsec. (a), is title I of , , which is classified generally to subchapter I (§ 80a–1 et seq.) of chapter 2D of Title 15, Commerce and Trade. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act Aug. 22, 1940, ch. 68654 Stat. 789section 80a–51 of Title 15

Amendments2014—Subsec. (a)(1). inserted “on or” before “before” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 113–2952010—Subsec. (a). , in concluding provisions, inserted at end “For purposes of paragraph (2), a dividend attributable to any short-term capital gain with respect to which a notice is required under the Investment Company Act of 1940 shall be treated as the same type of dividend as a capital gain dividend.”Pub. L. 111–325, § 304(c), substituted “and (c)” for “, (c) and (d)” in concluding provisions.Pub. L. 111–325, § 301(g)(2)Subsec. (a)(1). , amended par. (1) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (1) read as follows: “declares a dividend prior to the time prescribed by law for the filing of its return for a taxable year (including the period of any extension of time granted for filing such return), and”.Pub. L. 111–325, § 304(a)Subsec. (a)(2). , substituted “the first dividend payment of the same type of dividend” for “the first regular dividend payment”.Pub. L. 111–325, § 304(b)Subsecs. (c), (d). , redesignated subsec. (d) as (c) and struck out former subsec. (c). Text of former subsec. (c) read as follows: “In the case of amounts to which subsection (a) is applicable, any notice to shareholders required under this part with respect to such amounts shall be made not later than 60 days after the close of the taxable year in which the distribution is made.”Pub. L. 111–325, § 301(g)(1)1988—Subsec. (b). substituted “section 852(b)(7)” for “section 852(b)(6)”.Pub. L. 100–6471986—Subsec. (b). , substituted “Except as provided in section 852(b)(6), amounts” for “Amounts”.Pub. L. 99–514, § 651(b)(1)(B)Subsec. (c). , substituted “60 days” for “45 days”.Pub. L. 99–514, § 655(a)(5)1976—Subsec. (a). struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–4551964—Subsec. (c). substituted “45 days” for “30 days”.Pub. L. 88–2721960—Subsec. (c). substituted “this part” for “this subchapter”.Pub. L. 86–779

children.label: A
children.text: the 15th day of the 9th month following the close of the taxable year, or

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of an extension of time for filing the company’s return for the taxable year, the due date for filing such return taking into account such extension, and

distributes the amount of such dividend to shareholders in the 12-month period following the close of such taxable year and not later than the date of the first dividend payment of the same type of dividend made after such declaration,

children.heading: Receipt by shareholder
children.label: b Receipt by shareholder
children.text: Except as provided in section 852(b)(7), amounts to which subsection (a) is applicable shall be treated as received by the shareholder in the taxable year in which the distribution is made.

children.heading: Foreign tax election
children.label: c Foreign tax election
children.text: If an investment company to which section 853 is applicable for the taxable year makes a distribution as provided in subsection (a) of this section, the shareholders shall consider the amounts described in section 853(b)(2) allocable to such distribution as paid or received, as the case may be, in the taxable year in which the distribution is made.
